寒夜翩跹 安息在森林的生灵化作灵蝶，以思念为指引，与迷途的旅人短暂相会。\n1月18日更新后，主题活动【暮冬的溯影】限时开启！感应非凡性感套装【诺特·暮冬烁灵】！\n*套装动作【神蝶召来】可在完成【暮冬烁灵】套装及设计师之影收集后通过【成就】获取。 \n⭐暮冬烁灵⭐设计灵感揭秘：\n传闻在北地，有片只在闪电夜出现的奇幻森林。\n自由的生灵离去后，会化为蝴蝶在此处安息。\n今夜，是否有人会如传说般，去到那片森林之中？\n从枯木涌起的白雾，迷路的孩子，深藏于心底的回忆……\n记忆重逢，诺特忽然想起，那个从未忘记过的名字。\n灵蝶翩跹而来，轻轻点在他的嘴唇，仿佛诉说着无尽的思念。\n今夜过后，风停雪止，窗外朝阳初升，北地迎来了久违的晴天。\n尘封的大门缓缓开启，不起眼的枯木法杖上再度浮现古老预言，\n“摆脱命运之子，终结宿命之争”。 \n⭐暮冬烁灵⭐设计亮点：\n忽闪的灵蝶穿越白雾，起舞于梦境与回忆之间。\n黑色的枯木矗立在夜色之中，高悬的提灯散发出静谧的冷光。\n入夜后的迷雾是森林的意志，引导生灵走向平静与安息。\n这是一支由叹息组成的安魂曲。#闪耀暖暖\",\"itemId\":\"7324170854047304960\",\"statisticsInfo\":{\"collectCount\":121,\"diggCount\":3757,\"commentCount\":898},\"appId\":1128,\"secId\":\"Dw+KtzxdxKL616T5MQ14rZZ5xwiEuBf4kH7JgBJbEf0VuS9QAa2BMrYOqcx33KP0ijrzyiEscwTNY+mK\",\"isUserDigged\":false,\"longSecId\":\"Ci/KWnAeHBqexlfOnaNlJWGSFpPIKbK3UBHZC2mIMdL+sUnL+PniHOmbqUbV5/sPxxpLCjwGi65Vz1YTC6zntZE/oGo8mHbNFCYdC9xyKR8aH79oRajqVAcVFFFyuLabIxTPOPrQsly1ouUsEkjtUhEQrvzGDRj1vIa1CSABIgEDcw5L9w==\"},\"hideTxt\":\"未上架\",\"subTitle\":\"新年新气象，龙年行大运\",\"title\":\"暖暖祝你新春喜气洋洋\",\"cardType\":\"video\",\"showTitle\":true,\"moduleType\":2,\"uniqueId\":\"7324956075113840678\",\"bgImg\":[{\"showRetry\":true,\"showReplace\":true,\"name\":\"imageUpload.jpeg\",\"size\":\"6.6kb\",\"imageQuality\":\"\",\"status\":\"success\",\"showPicInfo\":true,\"url\":\"https://p9-magic.byteimg.com/tos-cn-i-tokbwntzau/magic_eco/cd309b15c7fe4d76a93106ef4fee4584~tplv-tokbwntzau-perf:0:0:q75.image?size=140x180\u0026magic_type=image_jpeg\",\"uid\":\"0.5478883104461616\"}],\"tabKey\":\"tab208\",\"cardTag\":\"精彩内容\",\"id\":\"c9d8a79bfa6aa7b1851ee571551e6c68\"},{\"bgImg\":[{\"imageQuality\":\"\",\"showReplace\":true,\"showPicInfo\":true,\"status\":\"success\",\"size\":\"9.5kb\",\"url\":\"https://p3-magic.byteimg.com/tos-cn-i-tokbwntzau/magic_eco/f022f5353e127be84aabb98ef2789f8b~tplv-tokbwntzau-perf:0:0:q75.image?size=140x180\u0026magic_type=image_jpeg\",\"uid\":\"0.4879801844089753\",\"showRetry\":true,\"name\":\"imageUpload.jpeg\"}],\"title\":\"崩坏3神秘嘉宾惊喜拜年\",\"moduleType\":2,\"prefectureName\":\"崩坏3\",\"videoIdObj\":{\"longSecId\":\"Ci970c1GJI/XZlRPLee8hHqoHpRAxJCsq+ut2EPS3QVqBvNrkUeeprqrZxwgM1D6eRpLCjz7PW4I5sHODtjOBed0+akprUgQCZshSPkom6m2cLv+D8/Z81wfL+UMe3nwpjLwiaLFyLKQyM2Kz6dV/wcQwojHDRj1vIa1CSABIgED8czK7g==\",\"isUserDigged\":false,\"appId\":1128,\"videoInfo\":{\"bigCoverUrl\":\"https://p26-sign.douyinpic.com/tos-cn-p-0015/oo3TdyCDjR7wBQkQ "cubic_fc3ba_config_resource_9":"{\"titleLogo\":\"https://sf1-cdn-tos.douyinstatic.com/obj/magic-cn/cubic/pure_png/title_new.png\",\"__version\":1}","cubic_olympic_ab":0,"cyber_0f91a_0802_setting":"{\"guideSchema\":\"https://www.bytedance.net/\",\"waitSec\":23,\"__version\":3}","cyber_act_yyh_ab":3,"cyber_act_yyh_effect_ab":0,"cyber_act_yyh_enable_scroll_monitor":0,"cyber_banner_switch":"prod","daily_rank_perf_config":{"enableSkeleton":true,"enableStraigtOut":true},"deco_text_modify_frequency":5,"disable_feed_mix_live_router_check":1,"disable_game_lottery":0,"doodle_max_count":140,"doodle_min_count":10,"ec_channel_check_login":0,"ecom_aftersale_aftersale_auto_next":0,"ecom_aftersale_big_font":0,"ecom_aftersale_instant_retail":0,"ecom_aftersale_returnbook_split":0,"ecom_aftersale_review":"0","ecom_comment_rank_style":0,"ecom_comment_style_opt1":0,"ecom_comment_style_opt2":0,"ecom_comment_upload":0,"ecom_fast_refund_colorless":0,"ecom_live_product_rank_ruler":[{"content":"- 抖音电商直播间带货榜是根据真实数据进行排名的直播间排行榜，希望帮助消费者通过榜单找到正在直播的好商品，让选择更简单。直播间排名越靠前曝光机会越大。","title":"直播间带货榜"},{"content":"- 直播间带货榜当前分为总榜、抖音旗舰榜、特色主题榜、国家补贴榜、商品类目榜，榜单形态持续更新中：\n- 总榜：按照上榜规则对全部电商直播间进行排序展示\n- 抖音旗舰榜：聚合抖音旗舰店铺热销直播间进行排序展示\n- 特色主题榜：由抖音电商运营就特色主题或活动，按照特定规则对直播间进行圈选后排序展示\n- 国家补贴榜：聚合正在直播国家补贴商品的直播间进行排序展示\n- 商品类目榜：按照直播间在播商品所属类目对相关直播间进行排序后展示","title":"榜单介绍"},{"content":"- 上榜直播间均为正在直播的直播间\n- 上榜作者基础要求：近30天无虚假交易处罚记录，近14天退单率无异常、无严重违规记录\n- 排序规则：以该直播间所售卖商品的【带货力、互动力、吸引力】进行综合排名，每小时结算","title":"上榜规则"},{"content":"- 带货力：根据单位时间内的交易额、交易量等数据指标综合评估直播间主播的带货能力\n- 互动力：根据单位时间内的直播间观看时长、分享率、评论率等数据指标综合评估直播间的互动氛围\n- 吸引力：根据单位时间内购买商品的新用户数、新增粉丝数等数据指标综合评估直播间对平台用户的吸引力","title":"指标解读"},{"content":"- 为保证榜单时效性，榜单每小时进行动态更新。由于技术等原因，榜单更新时间偶有延迟，具体更新时间以实际情况为准。\n- 直播间榜单会露出商品名称和商品标签。所有的上榜直播间都会展示一款商品，并露出对应的商品名称。同时，结合商品名称的露出，会露出唯一的商品标签，该标签由算法选取商品详情页的商品已有标签作为候选，不同的用户看到的标签不尽相同。整体上，商品标签的露出是为了给用户提供更多的决策理由，帮助更快的找到合适的直播间/商品。\n- 榜单排名旁的说明属于热度值标签，用于鼓励榜单中前3名的直播间和整体数据表现较好的直播间。热度标签只有三种，分别为：蝉联榜首、持续霸榜、排名飙升。每个直播间最多展示一种标签，若同一直播间同时获得多种热度标签，则按算法筛选展示唯一标签。\n- 平台将实时监控上榜直播间的数据表现，若发现直播间有刷单、互动异常、售卖假冒盗版商品等违规作弊行为，将立即对违规直播间进行下榜。低质作者、近期有虚假交易判罚、假货山寨判罚、直播间有处罚消息的作者均会有一定的上榜限制，请务必诚信经营、用心直播。","title":"补充说明"}],"ecom_live_scene_id_allow_list":["1001","1003","1031","1098","1099","1046","1091","1092","1093","1095","1082","1086","1087"],"ecom_logistics_map_late":0,"ecom_share_desc_type":0,"ecom_toolbar_ab":1,"effect_download_opt":true,"enable_anchor_gift":1,"enable_annie_live_transition_from_vc_fix":1,"enable_audio_draw_opt":false,"enable_broadcast_high_profile":1,"enable_feed_mix_live_router_check_arr":["search_result","general_search"],"enable_gift_extra_flex_model":false,"enable_gift_mp4_after_change_room":1,"enable_giftvideoview_render_appstate":0,"enable_live_thirhas_prop_bundled_party":false,"enable_new_guest_list_rule":true,"enable_preview_room_in_mobile_network":1,"enable_public_screen_layout_service":false,"enable_space_opt":false,"enable_switch_landscape":1,"enable_upstream_log":1,"enable_vip_recommend":true,"ent_bill_retain_popup":0,"entry":{"wallet_home":"sslocal://webcast_wallet"},"faction_competition_cross_room_rules":[{"desc":"榜单按照加入粉丝团、新增粉丝、送礼等互动行为综合排序，榜单值越高排名越靠前。","title":"排名规则"},{"desc":"榜单开启期间，观众每送出10钻石礼物、5名观众首次加入粉丝团或新增5个粉丝，均有机会为本直播间正在表演成员贡献1点榜单值，每名成员最多通过新加粉丝团获得1000点榜单值，每名成员最多通过新增粉丝获得1000点榜单值。","title":"计值规则"},{"desc":"本次活动由机构自行举办，与抖音平台无关。直播过程中有可能出现网络波动等极端情况导致数值存在一定误差的情况。","title":"其他"}],"faction_competition_region_rank_rules":[{"desc":"1）团员排名：自然日内累计榜单值，按赛道分别进行榜单排名，榜单数值每日24点清零，次日重新开始累计，达到当日晋级名次的主播成功进入下一轮。\n2）计值规则：1榜单值=10音浪=5新加团=5新增关注人数，每天最多通过加团获得1000榜单值，每天最多通过新增关注获得1000榜单值","title":"团员排名规则"},{"desc":"团榜单值=该团常驻团员榜单值加和，常驻团员将按照近期团员上场次数、送礼等数据综合判定，无法自主修改。","title":"团排名规则"},{"desc":"厂牌榜单值由旗下团员当日榜单值与榜单排名结果综合计算得出。每日比赛结束后（24:00）更新当日积分及排名结果。\n1）团员当日榜单值：当日超过1000荣誉值（+2分）；当日超过5000荣誉值（+5分）。若当日荣誉值超过5000，仅按+5分计，不与1000档叠加计算。单人单日最高得分为5分。\n2）团员榜单排名：每日比赛结束后，按厂牌团员排名计算得分，厂牌将获得其所有入榜团员的排名分之和。 :720},"share_title":"","share_title_myself":"","share_title_other":"","share_url":"","share_weibo_desc":""},"short_id":"94503350831","signature":"点赞+关注，不迷路","signature_extra":null,"special_follow_status":0,"special_people_labels":null,"status":1,"story25_comment":0,"story_interactive":0,"story_ttl":0,"text_extra":null,"total_favorited":78082,"uid":"7434418908100133948","unique_id":"94503350831","user_age":-1,"user_canceled":false,"user_permissions":null,"verification_type":1},"author_mask_tag":0,"author_user_id":7434418908100133948,"aweme_control":{"can_comment":true,"can_forward":true,"can_share":true,"can_show_comment":true},"aweme_id":"7605950727755746623","aweme_listen_struct":{"trace_info":"{\"copyright_not_speech\":\"false\",\"copyright_reason\":\"has_listen_cp_new\",\"copyright_tag_hit\":\"\",\"copyright_use_aed_default\":\"false\",\"copyright_use_tag_default\":\"false\",\"cp_ab\":\"true\",\"desc\":\"\",\"duration_over\":\"true\",\"hit_high_risk\":\"false\",\"media_type\":\"4\",\"reason\":\"hit_ab_0\",\"show\":\"false\"}"},"aweme_type":0,"aweme_type_tags":"","boost_status":0,"can_cache_to_local":true,"caption":"","cf_assets_type":0,"cf_recheck_ts":0,"challenge_position":null,"chapter_abstract":"13个世界上最大的石头，包括圣多美大狗峰、魔鬼塔、波浪岩、瓜塔佩巨岩、祖玛岩、乌鲁鲁、卡磁吸柱、黑岩山、石子岩、波尔金字塔、石头山和罗赖马山。这些石头因其巨大的尺寸、独特的形状和地质特征而闻名于世，吸引着众多游客和探险者。","chapter_data":{"recommend_type":"1"},"chapter_list":[{"desc":"引言","detail":"","timestamp":0,"url":"https://p3-pc-sign.douyinpic.com/obj/tos-cn-p-0015/ea65dd09a80c4dac8b99d2bb7c957b9f?lk3s=138a59ce\u0026x-expires=1776794400\u0026x-signature=4dV6HxHBmulnHOy8bZlR6%2FBW%2Bas%3D\u0026from=327834062"},{"desc":"圣多美大狗峰","detail":"位于西非圣多美岛雨林，海拔663米，是火山口形成的石柱，表面长满青苔，周围有黑眼镜蛇。","timestamp":27500,"url":"https://p9-pc-sign.douyinpic.com/obj/tos-cn-p-0015/6a1902fe8728405194289c03494d88ed?lk3s=138a59ce\u0026x-expires=1776794400\u0026x-signature=uFgC7okqRUenStqvWCr8TUkoI1c%3D\u0026from=327834062"},{"desc":"魔鬼塔","detail":"位于美国，高264米，是柱状节理的火山口，被称为熊的家或树岩，现为美国国家纪念碑。","timestamp":131000,"url":"https://p3-pc-sign.douyinpic.com/obj/tos-cn-p-0015/321bb3011780468fa6f9ab7a0223926e?lk3s=138a59ce\u0026x-expires=1776794400\u0026x-signature=TwRNGzMbJtP69TOk0ThrAooQHJ4%3D\u0026from=327834062"},{"desc":"波浪岩","detail":"位于澳大利亚，长110米，高15米，形状像海浪，是地下秘密整形手术的结果，周围有彩虹蛇爬过的痕迹。","timestamp":260000,"url":"https://p3-pc-sign.douyinpic.com/obj/tos-cn-p-0015/3701e85c4f4e476099284a755bf0c429?lk3s=138a59ce\u0026x-expires=1776794400\u0026x-signature=TYJDND4vB0NVDUWgiZonpCm1bUk%3D\u0026from=327834062"},{"desc":"瓜塔佩巨岩","detail":"位于哥伦比亚，重6600万吨，是花岗岩，有一道拉链状的阶梯，可通往观景台，可俯瞰瓜塔佩水库。","timestamp":364000,"url":"https://p3-pc-sign.douyinpic.com/obj/tos-cn-p-0015/02d1cfb7167b4b0b9e637e1ad7c8e924?lk3s=138a59ce\u0026x-expires=1776794400\u0026x-signature=a%2Fbat0131EtX7GV61im1bXuZ0gg%3D\u0026from=327834062"},{"desc":"祖玛岩","detail":"位于尼日利亚，高725米，周长3.1公里，形状像人脸，是尼日利亚国民级偶像，被印在100奈拉钞票上。","timestamp":484000,"url":"https://p3-pc-sign.douyinpic.com/obj/tos-cn-p-0015/66785f8a39754312b863f4fff6bd8b3d?lk3s=138a59ce\u0026x-expires=1776794400\u0026x-signature=QxhZGCRInkGRDTtbb1bSRtMYv3g%3D\u0026from=327834062"},{"desc":"乌鲁鲁","detail":"位于澳大利亚，高348米，周长9.4公里，是含铁量高的砂岩，可随太阳角度变化颜色，是原住民祖先灵魂栖息地。","timestamp":601000,"url":"https://p3-pc-sign.douyinpic.com/obj/tos-cn-p-0015/776add872adf4d88b8207b4c6c9bf827?lk3s=138a59ce\u0026x-expires=1776794400\u0026x-signature=P83dVxC0CGvbb8TR%2FN6A0AhT4GY%3D\u0026from=327834062"},{"desc":"卡磁吸柱","detail":"位于印尼，高40米，是石灰岩石柱，顶部有教堂，被称为生命之柱，严禁女性登顶。","timestamp":724500,"url":"https://p3-pc-sign.douyinpic.com/obj/tos-cn-p-0015/d13e88ed1a6946a3acbc75a34f9b7d90?lk3s=138a59ce\u0026x-expires=1776794400\u0026x-signature=g6SyKUOxr0G4oc5FNr7leFc2wMk%3D\u0026from=327834062"},{"desc":"黑岩山","detail":"位于印尼，高600米，海拔900多米，是花岗岩，顶端和缝隙里有猪笼草，是攀岩界小众圣地。","timestamp":817500,"url":"https://p3-pc-sign.douyinpic.com/obj/tos-cn-p-0015/f48beb4ee13040d680fdf19a01d57cb6?lk3s=138a59ce\u0026x-expires=1776794400\u0026x-signature=p6dwraaojrTWmoISD0qnxT16AaM%3D\u0026from=327834062"},{"desc":"本阿梅拉","detail":"位于毛里塔尼亚，高400多米，是火山喷发后留下的岩浆栓，与另一块巨石相望，被称为本阿梅拉。","timestamp":925000,"url":"https://p3-pc-sign.douyinpic.com/obj/tos-cn-p-0015/f1b8ba702e4249859c37a7d8f2e1d3cf?lk3s=138a59ce\u0026x-expires=1776794400\u0026x-signature=B3%2FYcUiElWhuWAwEg38QtUa7EC8%3D\u0026from=327834062"},{"desc":"石子岩","detail":"位于斯里兰卡，高200米，是火山喷发后留下的实心岩浆栓，像个巨大的树墩子，顶部有狮子爪形状的建筑。","timestamp":1011500,"url":"https://p3-pc-sign.douyinpic.com/obj/tos-cn-p-0015/f8f061f3aa22477eb026cf81623ae256?lk3s=138a59ce\u0026x-expires=1776794400\u0026x-signature=kD%2BqEeMEVif6U8r8WvqWtmDtaSM%3D\u0026from=327834062"},{"desc":"波尔金字塔","detail":"位于澳大利亚，高562米，是火山活动形成的孤岛，形状像金字塔，有独特生态系统，栖息着菱角圆柱虫。","timestamp":1130500,"url":"https://p3-pc-sign.douyinpic.com/obj/tos-cn-p-0015/44a1b8ac274c409e9485be0a7e999ec4?lk3s=138a59ce\u0026x-expires=1776794400\u0026x-signature=POLDbowS4KT98sseCsxhJcFwTnw%3D\u0026from=327834062"},{"desc":"石头山","detail":"位于美国，高251米，是花岗岩，侧面有世界最大高浮雕，可选择徒步或缆车登顶。","timestamp":1232500,"url":"https://p3-pc-sign.douyinpic.com/obj/tos-cn-p-0015/8f86d51d847348ddaa66547666391126?lk3s=138a59ce\u0026x-expires=1776794400\u0026x-signature=EaQr3V3tj8lg85201PEYZ30Nx4A%3D\u0026from=327834062"},{"desc":"罗赖马山","detail":"位于委内瑞拉，高2810米，是地球上最古老的地质构造之一，顶部平坦，有独特生态系统，被称为伟大的蓝绿之母。","timestamp":1363500,"url":"https://p3-pc-sign.douyinpic.com/obj/tos-cn-p-0015/cd13692210a343799703a645d3cbae1f?lk3s=138a59ce\u0026x-expires=1776794400\u0026x-signature=zjNhtB6bGdXINLGqpwm2a5tOWMI%3D\u0026from=327834062"}],"chapter_review_status":2,"collect_stat":0,"collection_corner_mark":0,"comment_gid":7605950727755746623,"comment_list":null,"comment_permission_info":{"can_comment":true,"comment_permission_status":0,"item_detail_entry":false,"press_entry":false,"toast_guide":false},"commerce_config_data":null,"component_control":{"data_source_url":"/aweme/v1/web/aweme/detail/"},"component_info_v2":"{\"desc_lines_limit\":0,\"hide_marquee\":false}","cover_labels":null,"create_time":1770898422,"danmaku_control":{"activities":[{"id":1224,"type":1}],"danmaku_cnt":32 "},"sub_type":0,"type":2,"user_count":0,"view_count":0}],"challenge_position":null,"chapter_abstract":"恐龙化石之所以只能在少数地方被发现，是因为恐龙尸体在死后会迅速分解，只有在极其特殊的条件下，如被泥石流掩埋、经历石化作用、处于合适的地质年代和岩石类型中，才能形成化石。此外，化石还需经历板块构造运动、波石作用等才能暴露在地表。因此，恐龙化石的发现是极其偶然的，是大自然历经漫长岁月的筛选和淘汰后的奇迹。","chapter_bar_color":null,"chapter_data":{"ad_chapter_index_list":null,"recommend_type":"1"},"chapter_list":[{"desc":"引言","detail":"恐龙曾遍布全球，但恐龙化石仅在少数地方被发现。","points":null,"timestamp":0,"url":"https://p3-pc-sign.douyinpic.com/obj/tos-cn-p-0015/d4bcbde1b283433abe67d2335fd838b3?lk3s=138a59ce\u0026x-expires=1776794400\u0026x-signature=dHaxwYsvOZg5ih0EcITKBc2P50s%3D\u0026from=327834062"},{"desc":"恐龙尸体的分解","detail":"恐龙尸体在死后几年内会被分解，99.99%的恐龙尸骸会消失。","points":null,"timestamp":47000,"url":"https://p3-pc-sign.douyinpic.com/obj/tos-cn-p-0015/e4c0f0a7f2344b41bd220a4903438804?lk3s=138a59ce\u0026x-expires=1776794400\u0026x-signature=aonCKm1%2Bt2XQRyy9OjXS1GMRwZU%3D\u0026from=327834062"},{"desc":"化石的形成","detail":"恐龙化石形成需满足无氧掩埋、石化作用等条件，淘汰了绝大多数恐龙。","points":null,"timestamp":85000,"url":"https://p3-pc-sign.douyinpic.com/obj/tos-cn-p-0015/46f2d85e704142e6a5b83d8885b3a6e8?lk3s=138a59ce\u0026x-expires=1776794400\u0026x-signature=RXUKSDVAGn34u2kWb3blROq6Lqw%3D\u0026from=327834062"},{"desc":"地质学筛选","detail":"只有沉积岩才能保存化石，其他岩石会破坏化石。","points":null,"timestamp":154000,"url":"https://p3-pc-sign.douyinpic.com/obj/tos-cn-p-0015/9c3b2fe9ce604f7b87398c68d19c5aeb?lk3s=138a59ce\u0026x-expires=1776794400\u0026x-signature=XwrYNhrfPzADVGWLx7CYhASiq%2BI%3D\u0026from=327834062"},{"desc":"时间窗口的限制","detail":"恐龙生存时间窗口限制在中生代，进一步压缩了可能存在化石的区域。","points":null,"timestamp":214000,"url":"https://p3-pc-sign.douyinpic.com/obj/tos-cn-p-0015/2ba9cbdb8ded4962ade33f14b90f6fcc?lk3s=138a59ce\u0026x-expires=1776794400\u0026x-signature=U798P%2B24uGlJnqD2z9ADYKovru8%3D\u0026from=327834062"},{"desc":"化石的暴露","detail":"化石需经历板块构造运动、波石作用等才能暴露在地表。","points":null,"timestamp":273000,"url":"https://p3-pc-sign.douyinpic.com/obj/tos-cn-p-0015/76d441845d224a969f76ba28f6622189?lk3s=138a59ce\u0026x-expires=1776794400\u0026x-signature=eUjAy2x98iC7wz8z6kDJVMoYvYU%3D\u0026from=327834062"},{"desc":"结语","detail":"恐龙化石的发现是极其偶然的，是宇宙级奇迹。","points":null,"timestamp":350000,"url":"https://p3-pc-sign.douyinpic.com/obj/tos-cn-p-0015/b7920d2b5bca46b58f3738bb6a7e2eec?lk3s=138a59ce\u0026x-expires=1776794400\u0026x-signature=aiidhLGgEkRfMde3c9W%2Bgqo5NXE%3D\u0026from=327834062"}],"chapter_review_status":2,"collect_stat":0,"comment_list":null,"comment_permission_info":{"can_comment":true,"comment_permission_status":0,"item_detail_entry":false,"press_entry":false,"toast_guide":false},"commerce_config_data":null,"commerce_top_labels":null,"create_scale_type":null,"create_time":1772631353,"danmaku_control":{"activities":[{"id":1224,"type":1}],"danmaku_cnt":110,"enable_danmaku":true,"is_post_denied":false,"pass_through_params":"{\"has_danmaku\":1}","post_denied_reason":"","post_privilege_level":0,"skip_danmaku":false,"smart_mode_decision":0},"desc":"为啥恐龙化石只出现在少数几个地方，其他地方没恐龙吗？ "},"sub_type":0,"type":2,"user_count":0,"view_count":0}],"challenge_position":null,"chapter_abstract":"世界上最奇特的10种树包括龙血树、旅行者之树、红树林、天使橡树、生命之树、科里亚、帝王蝴蝶树、死亡之树、猴面包树和毒番石榴。这些树因其独特的外观、生存环境、生态功能或与人类的关系而闻名。有些树具有药用价值，有些是重要的生态系统组成部分，还有些则具有致命的毒性。","chapter_bar_color":null,"chapter_data":{"ad_chapter_index_list":null,"recommend_type":"1"},"chapter_list":[{"desc":"引言","detail":"","points":null,"timestamp":1000,"url":"https://p3-pc-sign.douyinpic.com/obj/tos-cn-p-0015/1d2c825966d4450599a76937b0c95bc3?lk3s=138a59ce\u0026x-expires=1776794400\u0026x-signature=4spI3D9PbjnDT9rH28vdhb0600o%3D\u0026from=327834062"},{"desc":"索科特拉龙血树","detail":"龙血树生长在也门索科特拉群岛，树冠呈倒置雨伞状，汁液被称为龙血，具有抗菌和抗炎作用。","points":null,"timestamp":12000,"url":"https://p9-pc-sign.douyinpic.com/obj/tos-cn-p-0015/60582baba38a40e891071a74672fd63f?lk3s=138a59ce\u0026x-expires=1776794400\u0026x-signature=Cei2ztwJ8pdr8NiYIPBL6zcB1co%3D\u0026from=327834062"},{"desc":"旅行者之树","detail":"旅行者之树是马达加斯加特有植物，叶片如扇面，花朵藏于叶间，与狐猴形成授粉关系。","points":null,"timestamp":119000,"url":"https://p3-pc-sign.douyinpic.com/obj/tos-cn-p-0015/d85a12534dba43efa9214afde40a1e47?lk3s=138a59ce\u0026x-expires=1776794400\u0026x-signature=CTHR%2FsO15edNIXU%2F1bup8ifrw2U%3D\u0026from=327834062"},{"desc":"红树林之树","detail":"红树林能适应海水或半咸水环境，具有超强的盐分适应能力和独特的呼吸根结构。","points":null,"timestamp":222000,"url":"https://p3-pc-sign.douyinpic.com/obj/tos-cn-p-0015/70f763dcd82f4484a76f7d6f7dfa1b61?lk3s=138a59ce\u0026x-expires=1776794400\u0026x-signature=XNln1NsO3lD%2BqJXuk7EfAapbJIc%3D\u0026from=327834062"},{"desc":"天使橡树","detail":"天使橡树是世界上最美丽的树木之一，高达20米，树干周长8.5米，树冠覆盖面积1600平方米。","points":null,"timestamp":369000,"url":"https://p3-pc-sign.douyinpic.com/obj/tos-cn-p-0015/c0c7070fd87b4a77be073575422bd8bd?lk3s=138a59ce\u0026x-expires=1776794400\u0026x-signature=xVImn1s4TqtKBocdr3t%2FwZFDFYc%3D\u0026from=327834062"},{"desc":"生命之树","detail":"生命之树是玛雅文明中的神圣树，主要分布在热带地区，其种子可榨油，树皮可作药材。","points":null,"timestamp":453000,"url":"https://p3-pc-sign.douyinpic.com/obj/tos-cn-p-0015/8b3b862e9f8d42f8a6c6ab599057b23f?lk3s=138a59ce\u0026x-expires=1776794400\u0026x-signature=1zc8i3EqUJwIvuZSkqKR3qimYeI%3D\u0026from=327834062"},{"desc":"科里亚","detail":"科里亚是一种豆科树木，生长在加勒比地区，其果实富含单宁，可用于皮革、鞣质和黑色染料的制作。","points":null,"timestamp":565000,"url":"https://p3-pc-sign.douyinpic.com/obj/tos-cn-p-0015/4654af2cbfa1482092ba89992742a73d?lk3s=138a59ce\u0026x-expires=1776794400\u0026x-signature=82DYBJ36kXl3tpjzSy2u51LOiwo%3D\u0026from=327834062"},{"desc":"帝王蝴蝶树","detail":"帝王蝴蝶树是帝王蝶的栖息地，生长在墨西哥中部和南部的火山高原地带，其分布区域因人类活动而缩小。","points":null,"timestamp":672000,"url":"https://p3-pc-sign.douyinpic.com/obj/tos-cn-p-0015/80708f5e5f1747549df220ec1ac2e0c3?lk3s=138a59ce\u0026x-expires=1776794400\u0026x-signature=4iVwuaNtAg%2BYFmr%2BGy9B%2FzhKaBs%3D\u0026from=327834062"},{"desc":"死亡之树","detail":"死亡之树生长在纳米布沙漠，因气候变迁和干旱而形成化石树林。","points":null,"timestamp":798000,"url":"https://p3-pc-sign.douyinpic.com/obj/tos-cn-p-0015/0eef742f0469423d8b7ee0f108c9f817?lk3s=138a59ce\u0026x-expires=1776794400\u0026x-signature=gsu9r3hYmA1QHKR%2FLcLuAIfkXIo%3D\u0026from=327834062"},{"desc":"猴面包树","detail":"猴面包树生长在马达加斯加西南部，树干粗大，能储存大量水分，其果实可食用，全身皆宝。","points":null,"timestamp":904000,"url":"https://p9-pc-sign.douyinpic.com/obj/tos-cn-p-0015/c6168ad6033d466989a336ffca79967a?lk3s=138a59ce\u0026x-expires=1776794400\u0026x-signature=OFKLjGHwPeH%2BiSsOx9DiynXEHaE%3D\u0026from=327834062"},{"desc":"毒番石榴","detail":"毒番石榴分布在热带地区，其果实、叶片、树皮和枝叶都含有剧毒，能阻挡风暴和防止沙滩侵蚀。","points":null,"timestamp":1036000,"url":"https://p3-pc-sign.douyinpic.com/obj/tos-cn-p-0015/4f6d23376d5042afac19530a9db14822?lk3s=138a59ce\u0026x-expires=1776794400\u0026x-signature=QN3FrMSnVG%2BsyOf%2Fra7M29TIZUE%3D\u0026from=327834062"}],"chapter_review_status":2,"collect_stat":0,"comment_list":null,"comment_permission_info":{"can_comment":true,"comment_permission_status":0,"item_detail_entry":false,"press_entry":false,"toast_guide":false},"commerce_config_data":null,"commerce_top_labels":null,"create_scale_type":null,"create_time":1772382680,"danmaku_control":{"activities":[{"id":1224, "},"sub_type":0,"type":0,"user_count":0,"view_count":0}],"challenge_position":null,"chapter_abstract":"全球最神秘的10个地方包括马拉开波湖、澳大利亚的粉色湖泊、十字架山、萨格索海、芬戈尔洞斯塔法岛、墨西哥城的库伊库尔科金字塔、舞动森林、波浪岩、斯凯利格迈克岛和地球之眼里沙特构造。这些地方各具特色，有的拥有壮观的自然景观，有的蕴含丰富的历史文化，还有的充满未解之谜，吸引着众多探险者和科学家前来探索。","chapter_bar_color":null,"chapter_data":{"ad_chapter_index_list":null,"recommend_type":"1"},"chapter_list":[{"desc":"引言","detail":"","points":null,"timestamp":1000,"url":"https://p3-pc-sign.douyinpic.com/obj/tos-cn-p-0015/e691bd6039a94275a725df250c924ebf?lk3s=138a59ce\u0026x-expires=1776794400\u0026x-signature=GVyUHSankJ8LzXmg6bik4REyWoo%3D\u0026from=327834062"},{"desc":"马拉开波湖","detail":"马拉开波湖位于委内瑞拉，拥有独特的卡塔通博闪电现象，每年闪电次数高达120万次。","points":null,"timestamp":18000,"url":"https://p3-pc-sign.douyinpic.com/obj/tos-cn-p-0015/e772ab992fab4dde845cfc985195a0ef?lk3s=138a59ce\u0026x-expires=1776794400\u0026x-signature=sjQSyAojp8jz3yOgL0MRLsSbcus%3D\u0026from=327834062"},{"desc":"澳大利亚的粉色湖泊","detail":"澳大利亚的粉色湖泊希尔湖，湖水呈粉色，由杜娜丽藻和红岩菌共同作用形成。","points":null,"timestamp":109000,"url":"https://p9-pc-sign.douyinpic.com/obj/tos-cn-p-0015/5a30121e728e42ce82a66e84311c2e71?lk3s=138a59ce\u0026x-expires=1776794400\u0026x-signature=JovICVLMtqAhZuTcCAfCkouJe54%3D\u0026from=327834062"},{"desc":"十字架山","detail":"十字架山位于立陶宛，由成千上万的十字架组成，起源传说丰富，是信仰象征。","points":null,"timestamp":165000,"url":"https://p3-pc-sign.douyinpic.com/obj/tos-cn-p-0015/437333f6b8364673a97b77875e7f3696?lk3s=138a59ce\u0026x-expires=1776794400\u0026x-signature=z1CLijwy44PmAJxo6zS1rvNwJ10%3D\u0026from=327834062"},{"desc":"萨格索海","detail":"萨格索海是地球上特殊的海域，漂浮着大量金褐色海藻，形成了复杂的生态系统。","points":null,"timestamp":270000,"url":"https://p3-pc-sign.douyinpic.com/obj/tos-cn-p-0015/584dcd1bcbcf4672964b549181dc3bae?lk3s=138a59ce\u0026x-expires=1776794400\u0026x-signature=FKiQ%2FrBuH7K9gNbYf2HChlCVQKw%3D\u0026from=327834062"},{"desc":"芬戈尔洞斯塔法岛","detail":"芬戈尔洞斯塔法岛位于赫布里底群岛，拥有独特的六边形玄武岩柱，吸引了众多游客。","points":null,"timestamp":368000,"url":"https://p3-pc-sign.douyinpic.com/obj/tos-cn-p-0015/44bf9edd444b4049bf9e10ad "},"sub_type":0,"type":1,"user_count":0,"view_count":0}],"challenge_position":null,"chapter_abstract":"复活节岛位于太平洋中央，岛上的拉帕努伊人在公元1200年建立了文明，他们建造了900座巨型石像，称为摩艾。然而，由于过度砍伐森林、资源短缺和部落冲突，这个文明在不到100年内衰落，最终走向灭亡。复活节岛的历史充满谜团，如摩艾石像的用途、朗格朗格文字的含义等，至今仍困扰着科学家。","chapter_bar_color":null,"chapter_data":{"ad_chapter_index_list":null,"recommend_type":"1"},"chapter_list":[{"desc":"引言","detail":"","points":null,"timestamp":1000,"url":"https://p3-pc-sign.douyinpic.com/obj/tos-cn-p-0015/f06c3504fb9a4af386865e68b0a63598?lk3s=138a59ce\u0026x-expires=1776794400\u0026x-signature=1ajf%2FJvnBIFfEMJCzWgmWUaDYAg%3D\u0026from=327834062"},{"desc":"复活节岛的地理位置","detail":"复活节岛位于太平洋中央，是地球上最孤独的地方，距离最近的大陆3500公里。","points":null,"timestamp":34000,"url":"https://p3-pc-sign.douyinpic.com/obj/tos-cn-p-0015/6f96f7fd3b35455d94d00f4c53d5e216?lk3s=138a59ce\u0026x-expires=1776794400\u0026x-signature=13He8Jx1dZylrhEh9GTKks8HeVk%3D\u0026from=327834062"},{"desc":"拉帕努伊人的迁徙","detail":"拉帕努伊人在霍图马图阿的带领下，乘坐独木舟在太平洋上漂流19天，到达复活节岛。","points":null,"timestamp":65000,"url":"https://p9-pc-sign.douyinpic.com/obj/tos-cn-p-0015/bc368e9ce5254e31b2d30b487c3ee392?lk3s=138a59ce\u0026x-expires=1776794400\u0026x-signature=sdoMohnxvDwZdie%2BzV4U3JjWFgk%3D\u0026from=327834062"},{"desc":"岛上的生活与信仰","detail":"岛上资源丰富，拉帕努伊人带来了甘薯、芋头、香蕉和鸡，他们相信部落里的重要人物死后灵魂会变成玛娜，继续保护后人，于是开始建造摩艾石像。","points":null,"timestamp":109000,"url":"https://p3-pc-sign.douyinpic.com/obj/tos-cn-p-0015/f88e05d6c5204356b240c7cee5c977bf?lk3s=138a59ce\u0026x-expires=1776794400\u0026x-signature=Yfu0lYuMsMyItl1vgh7%2BNp0TXBM%3D\u0026from=327834062"},{"desc":"石像的建造与搬运","detail":"石像平均重13吨，最重的达86吨，是被人走过来的，石像被竖立在阿湖的石台上，背对大海面朝村子，守护着族人。","points":null,"timestamp":131000,"url":"https://p3-pc-sign.douyinpic.com/obj/tos-cn-p-0015/020cf1de19fb4276bc87660c531fb869?lk3s=138a59ce\u0026x-expires=1776794400\u0026x-signature=n6m6gp70Z%2FJagpNB%2F7Q2%2F5KrNTw%3D\u0026from=327834062"},{"desc":"朗格朗格文字","detail":"拉帕努伊人发展出了朗格朗格文字，刻在木板上，但现在没有人能读懂。","points":null,"timestamp":309000,"url":"https://p3-pc-sign.douyinpic.com/obj/tos-cn-p-0015/687b997d767d4d7f8b7939cd29701267?lk3s=138a59ce\u0026x-expires=1776794400\u0026x-signature=9yb8Xwv2U1E4ZQlm1WRIh83BU00%3D\u0026from=327834062"},{"desc":"文明的衰落","detail":"为了造石像和开垦耕地，岛上的森林被砍伐殆尽，导致资源短缺，部落冲突加剧，最终人吃人，石像被推倒。","points":null,"timestamp":370000,"url":"https://p3-pc-sign.douyinpic.com/obj/tos-cn-p-0015/f9b710ae2f504acf89d192de9c5af3b8?lk3s=138a59ce\u0026x-expires=1776794400\u0026x-signature=MT8xYmB5%2BhW6rRoKX%2BLmfvYNKiQ%3D\u0026from=327834062"},{"desc":"结语","detail":"","points":null,"timestamp":498000,"url":"https://p3-pc-sign.douyinpic.com/obj/tos-cn-p-0015/568e6cfb2a7143f1b2b48be182511620?lk3s=138a59ce\u0026x-expires=1776794400\u0026x-signature=JTMq9IRy9CU1XfvoLw0oz3jAev4%3D\u0026from=327834062"}],"chapter_review_status":2,"collect_stat":0,"comment_list":null,"comment_permission_info":{"can_comment":true,"comment_permission_status":0,"item_detail_entry":false,"press_entry":false,"toast_guide":false},"commerce_config_data":null,"commerce_top_labels":null,"create_scale_type":null,"create_time":1773151345,"danmaku_control":{"activities":[{"id":1224,"type":1}],"danmaku_cnt":14,"enable_danmaku":true,"is_post_denied":false,"pass_through_params":"{\"has_danmaku\":1}","post_denied_reason":"","post_privilege_level":0,"skip_danmaku":false,"smart_mode_decision":0},"desc":"#摩艾石像 "},"sub_type":0,"type":0,"user_count":0,"view_count":0}],"challenge_position":null,"chapter_abstract":"远古时期的巨人脚印和其他异常现象挑战了我们对人类起源和演化的传统认知。从南非的歌利亚脚印、坦桑尼亚的莱托利足迹，到新墨西哥州的人类脚印和希腊克里特岛的古老足迹，这些发现引发了激烈的争论。尽管有些解释看似合理，但仍有许多谜团未解。这些发现提醒我们，地球的历史远比我们想象的复杂，我们对祖先的了解仍有很大的空间。","chapter_bar_color":null,"chapter_data":{"ad_chapter_index_list":null,"recommend_type":"3"},"chapter_list":[{"desc":"引言","detail":"","points":null,"timestamp":1000,"url":""},{"desc":"歌利亚脚印","detail":"20世纪初，南非猎人发现巨大人类脚印，被称为歌利亚脚印，全长120厘米，垂直印在崖壁上，地质学家无法解释其形成原因。","points":null,"timestamp":65000,"url":""},{"desc":"莱托利足迹","detail":"莱托利足迹是人类起源的重要证据，360万年前的脚印显示人类祖先早已学会直立行走。","points":null,"timestamp":229000,"url":""},{"desc":"新墨西哥州的足迹","detail":"新墨西哥州的足迹显示人类在冰河期就已在新大陆繁衍生息，比公认的时间早了一倍。","points":null,"timestamp":357000,"url":""},{"desc":"希腊克里特岛的足迹","detail":"希腊克里特岛的足迹将人类足部特征出现于欧洲的时间提前了数百万年，引发了人类演化史的重新思考。","points":null,"timestamp":471500,"url":""},{"desc":"迈斯特足迹","detail":"迈斯特足迹引发争议，有人认为是时间旅行者的鞋印，也有人认为是自然巧合。","points":null,"timestamp":644000,"url":""},{"desc":"帕拉克西谷地的足迹","detail":"帕拉克西谷地的足迹被认为是恐龙脚印的假象，提醒我们谨慎区分真实与幻象。","points":null,"timestamp":745000,"url":""},{"desc":"巨人存在的可能性","detail":"巨人存在的可能性受到质疑，地球引力和生物力学限制了巨人的存在，更可能是自然现象的巧合。","points":null,"timestamp":862000,"url":""},{"desc":"结语","detail":"远古足迹揭示地球秘密，推动科学进步，我们对祖先的认知仍在不断更新。","points":null,"timestamp":1014500,"url":""}],"chapter_review_status":2,"collect_stat":0,"comment_list":null,"comment_permission_info":{"can_comment":true,"comment_permission_status":0,"item_detail_entry":false,"press_entry":false,"toast_guide":false},"commerce_config_data":null,"commerce_top_labels":null,"create_scale_type":null,"create_time":1775138700,"danmaku_control":{"activities":[{"id":1224,"type":1}],"danmaku_cnt":19,"enable_danmaku":true,"is_post_denied":false,"pass_through_params":"{\"has_danmaku\":1}","post_denied_reason":"","post_privilege_level":0,"skip_danmaku":false,"smart_mode_decision":0},"desc":"9 "},"sub_type":0,"type":2,"user_count":0,"view_count":0}],"challenge_position":null,"chapter_abstract":"亚马逊雨林中存在许多惊人发现，包括沸腾河、奇特地雕、铜腿蓝蛙、水人族、亚马逊巨蛇传说、无腿如虫、亚马逊飞河、巨型河豚池兽、森林金字塔和亚马逊失落城市。这些发现挑战了我们对亚马逊雨林的传统认知，揭示了这片神秘土地上隐藏的未知世界。","chapter_bar_color":null,"chapter_data":{"ad_chapter_index_list":null,"recommend_type":"1"},"chapter_list":[{"desc":"引言","detail":"","points":null,"timestamp":1000,"url":"https://p9-pc-sign.douyinpic.com/obj/tos-cn-p-0015/31aeca5d166b4404a5ca599d8e5987da?lk3s=138a59ce\u0026x-expires=1776794400\u0026x-signature=%2F5g600AKv4j2XNaNF1e7gTqg49I%3D\u0026from=327834062"},{"desc":"沸腾河","detail":"位于秘鲁Huanaco地区，水温高达45-100摄氏度，无生物生存，地质学家无法解释其高温原因。","points":null,"timestamp":22000,"url":"https://p3-pc-sign.douyinpic.com/obj/tos-cn-p-0015/b22af6e3c8d74adb9ca24b5928fa1b8d?lk3s=138a59ce\u0026x-expires=1776794400\u0026x-signature=xwkBr6GHmJAR0aH8QakRtMLE%2BB0%3D\u0026from=327834062"},{"desc":"最奇特地雕","detail":"分布在巴西西部和亚马逊南部地区，形状奇异多样，可能是古代文明的遗迹，用途成谜。","points":null,"timestamp":123000,"url":"https://p3-pc-sign.douyinpic.com/obj/tos-cn-p-0015/c001b201567743b6b869231be6c924b3?lk3s=138a59ce\u0026x-expires=1776794400\u0026x-signature=fExC27zCmIEUGDdlW7ljgIzptUs%3D\u0026from=327834062"},{"desc":"铜腿蓝蛙","detail":"2023年首次发现，体型极小，背部浅蓝色，腿部金属铜色，可能含有强烈生物毒素，叫声独特。","points":null,"timestamp":242000,"url":"https://p3-pc-sign.douyinpic.com/obj/tos-cn-p-0015/0a6bae3f964246eb910a0563a7f41dee?lk3s=138a59ce\u0026x-expires=1776794400\u0026x-signature=10QlaqKp1O%2Fl0Rlgbx%2BX9uvVbcA%3D\u0026from=327834062"},{"desc":"水人族","detail":"传说生活在亚马逊河流域，样貌奇特，被认为是被诅咒的人类或水中精灵，部分部落信仰其为水之神。","points":null,"timestamp":344000,"url":"https://p3-pc-sign.douyinpic.com/obj/tos-cn-p-0015/3d4de25e07114ff29911ca18e2b81a78?lk3s=138a59ce\u0026x-expires=1776794400\u0026x-signature=BPOSE31PvKmV7TA9O%2Bl6y%2BE%2BzzE%3D\u0026from=327834062"},{"desc":"亚马逊巨蛇传说","detail":"亚马逊土著神话中的神灵，传说体长可达50米，能吞噬生命，让河流沸腾，20世纪初有探险家声称目睹。","points":null,"timestamp":456000,"url":"https://p3-pc-sign.douyinpic.com/obj/tos-cn-p-0015/d354febf369041e396fa2f2ec4a606a7?lk3s=138a59ce\u0026x-expires=1776794400\u0026x-signature=RhIRLZMe3MX1o5n%2BLSKWDFWfyJQ%3D\u0026from=327834062"},{"desc":"无腿如虫","detail":"外形像蚯蚓，无四肢，生活在地下，以蚯蚓、昆虫等为食，部分种类胎生，母体会分泌类似乳汁的液体。","points":null,"timestamp":593000,"url":"https://p3-pc-sign.douyinpic.com/obj/tos-cn-p-0015/fc4a7bfdb9dc4a1f94fc82bef9cfe732?lk3s=138a59ce\u0026x-expires=1776794400\u0026x-signature=d1OkxagJIdLuevkYJxiwTV37hcg%3D\u0026from=327834062"},{"desc":"亚马逊飞河","detail":"由亚马逊雨林的水蒸气形成，是全球气候系统的重要一环，维持了亚马逊雨林的湿润和全球气候调节。","points":null,"timestamp":735000,"url":"https://p3-pc-sign.douyinpic.com/obj/tos-cn-p-0015/a4ce7101fc5547c8b598b31f8d791ee1?lk3s=138a59ce\u0026x-expires=1776794400\u0026x-signature=E88psM79qv2ynSqivDQ6rR%2BvtFc%3D\u0026from=327834062"},{"desc":"巨型河豚池兽","detail":"被认为是已知最大的淡水池鲸，生活在远古湿地，体型巨大，灭绝于地质变化。","points":null,"timestamp":839000,"url":"https://p3-pc-sign.douyinpic.com/obj/tos-cn-p-0015/61a0940a740b48d3a0f1a01db640be03?lk3s=138a59ce\u0026x-expires=1776794400\u0026x-signature=%2FkkbGRKjZ%2FS%2FHoc%2F4BN7Xf1myAw%3D\u0026from=327834062"},{"desc":"森林金字塔","detail":"位于秘鲁与巴西交界，形似完美金字塔，可能是古老火山喷发或地下岩浆入侵形成，也可能是失落文明遗迹。","points":null,"timestamp":953000,"url":"https://p3-pc-sign.douyinpic.com/obj/tos-cn-p-0015/45be3204fd8545da888d6c2b2cc881d1?lk3s=138a59ce\u0026x-expires=1776794400\u0026x-signature=GYs1HgpnukeM4qO10tp1mkdFK3w%3D\u0026from=327834062"},{"desc":"亚马逊失落城市","detail":"位于厄瓜多尔东部，是古代文明中心，存在时间长达千年，规模可与古代欧洲城市媲美。","points":null,"timestamp":1082000,"url":"https://p3-pc-sign.douyinpic.com/obj/tos-cn-p-0015/40137e79e41c4ddca4db5557c99ecaa5?lk3s=138a59ce\u0026x-expires=1776794400\u0026x-signature=viojt%2FqTGVFXOBBxCShj8C0l3lE%3D\u0026from=327834062"}],"chapter_review_status":2,"collect_stat":0,"comment_list":null,"comment_permission_info":{"can_comment":true,"comment_permission_status":0,"item_detail_entry":false,"press_entry":false,"toast_guide":false},"commerce_config_data":null,"commerce_top_labels":null,"create_scale_type":null,"create_time":1774338135,"danmaku_control":{"
